cards.name: [DTE] Libros + Recepción — Phase 2 Frontend
cards.desc: Frontend UI for Libros (sales/purchase registers) and DTE Recepción (manage incoming DTEs). Depends on Phase 1 backend (completed).
checklist: Libros list view (ventas/compras with filters, pagination)
Recepción detail modal (state transitions, respuesta_sii display)
